core_concept: Technology as Theurgy - digital deities as system avatars

visual_elements.head_treatment: circular halos, helmets, veils, face obscured or replaced
visual_elements.materials: wet-look latex, iridescent holographics, liquid metal, crystalline beads
visual_elements.lighting: dramatic rim lighting, particle effects, dual lighting grammar
visual_elements.composition: symmetrical, centered, negative space, vertical emphasis
visual_elements.motifs: serpents, halos, veils, transparent anatomy, sacred geometry

character_archetypes.zenni: The Orchestrator - central command, omniscient presence
character_archetypes.dreami: The Creative Director - flowing, artistic, ethereal, brand voice
character_archetypes.iris: The Art Director + Social Voice - visual, rainbow, light refraction
character_archetypes.artemis: The Scout - huntress, tracker, lunar, bow/arrow motifs
character_archetypes.athena: The Strategist - wisdom, owl, armor, strategic

mood: Contemplative transcendence, luxury as inaccessibility, quiet power
